title: 发布包含完整供应链证据的新版本

sources.reason: Declares the new immutable release tag and its supply-chain digests.
Aligns installer metadata with the new release semver.
Publishes SBOM evidence for the release commit.
Publishes provenance evidence for the release commit and tag.
Canonical commands used to regenerate and validate release evidence.
Immutable tag distribution gate used for post-publish verification.

riskAssessment.reason: The release must be one immutable unit: commit, tag, release.json, installer, lock, SBOM, and provenance.

executionDecision.reason: The new tag and release publication are explicitly authorized by the user.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the published tag, release asset, and repository evidence are mutually consistent.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata and installer version metadata declare v0.5.23 consistently.
SBOM and provenance are regenerated for the release commit and validate locally.
The release commit and immutable v0.5.23 tag are pushed without rewriting v0.5.22.
GitHub Release v0.5.23 is published with the complete evidence unit and make check-release-distribution passes against it.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The old public v0.5.22 tag predates the supply-chain evidence now claimed by the worktree and cannot be rewritten safely.
constraints: Do not force-update or delete v0.5.22.
Keep release.json, installer, lock, SBOM, provenance, commit, and tag aligned.
Push only the authorized release branch state, tag, and GitHub Release.
intent.rationale: Publishing v0.5.23 as a new immutable release resolves the external release-unit mismatch while preserving historical release integrity.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Local release metadata and supply-chain evidence validate before commit.
Remote v0.5.23 tag contains the same release.json, installer, lock, SBOM, and provenance evidence as the release commit.
The public distribution gate passes against v0.5.23 while v0.5.22 remains unchanged.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized commit, push, tag update, and new release publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
